records.question: Which user profiles have the name Tyler Swift, at most 99999998 followers, and a partitionid of at least 10?
records.gold_sql:
SELECT user_profiles.uid FROM user_profiles
WHERE user_profiles.followers <= 99999998 AND user_profiles.name = 'Tyler Swift' AND user_profiles.partitionid >= 10
records.pred_sql:
SELECT user_profiles.uid
FROM user_profiles
WHERE followers <= 99999998
  AND name = 'Tyler Swift'
  AND partitionid >= 10

records.question: Which user profiles named Iron Man have tweets associated with them?
records.gold_sql:
SELECT user_profiles.uid FROM user_profiles
JOIN tweets ON user_profiles.uid = tweets.uid
WHERE user_profiles.name = 'Iron Man'
records.pred_sql:
SELECT user_profiles.uid
FROM user_profiles
JOIN tweets ON user_profiles.uid = tweets.uid
WHERE user_profiles.name = 'Iron Man'

records.question: Which user profiles with exactly 35,425,845 followers and an email of bw@superhero.com have a partition ID of at least 23 and tweeted exactly "Today I have went shopping at Laffayette." on 2018-03-09 20:01:02?
records.gold_sql:
SELECT user_profiles.uid FROM user_profiles
JOIN tweets ON user_profiles.uid = tweets.uid
WHERE tweets.text = 'Today I have went shopping at Laffayette.' AND tweets.createdate = '2018-03-09 20:01:02' AND user_profiles.followers = 35425845 AND user_profiles.partitionid >= 23 AND user_profiles.email = 'bw@superhero.com'
records.pred_sql:
SELECT user_profiles.uid
FROM user_profiles
JOIN tweets ON user_profiles.uid = tweets.uid
WHERE user_profiles.followers = 35425845
  AND user_profiles.partitionid >= 23
  AND user_profiles.email = 'bw@superhero.com'
  AND tweets.text = 'Today I have went shopping at Laffayette.'
  AND tweets.createdate = '2018-03-09 20:01:02'

records.question: Which user profiles have a partition ID of at most 5, an email of np@superstar.com, at least 94375428 followers, and a name exactly Natalie Portman?
records.gold_sql:
SELECT user_profiles.uid FROM user_profiles
WHERE user_profiles.partitionid <= 5 AND user_profiles.email = 'np@superstar.com' AND user_profiles.followers >= 94375428 AND user_profiles.name = 'Natalie Portman'
records.pred_sql:
SELECT user_profiles.uid
FROM user_profiles
WHERE partitionid <= 5
  AND email = 'np@superstar.com'
  AND followers >= 94375428
  AND name = 'Natalie Portman'

records.question: What user profiles have the name Celine Dion, exactly 23,927,492 followers, email cd@superstar.com, partition ID at least 5, and tweeted Let’s celebrate women, fight for equality and support each other,  not just today, but everyday! on or before 2018-03-12 02:30:30?
records.gold_sql:
SELECT user_profiles.uid FROM user_profiles
JOIN tweets ON user_profiles.uid = tweets.uid
WHERE user_profiles.email = 'cd@superstar.com' AND user_profiles.followers = 23927492 AND user_profiles.name = 'Celine Dion' AND user_profiles.partitionid >= 5 AND tweets.createdate <= '2018-03-12 02:30:30' AND tweets.text = 'Let’s celebrate women, fight for equality and support each other,  not just today, but everyday!'
records.pred_sql:
SELECT user_profiles.uid
FROM user_profiles
JOIN tweets ON user_profiles.uid = tweets.uid
WHERE user_profiles.email = 'cd@superstar.com'
  AND user_profiles.followers = 23927492
  AND user_profiles.name = 'Celine Dion'
  AND user_profiles.partitionid >= 5
  AND tweets.createdate <= '2018-03-12 02:30:30'
  AND tweets.text = 'Let’s celebrate women, fight for equality and support each other, not just today, but everyday!'
GROUP BY user_profiles.uid
HAVING COUNT(tweets.id) > 0

records.question: Which user profiles have at least 23927492 followers, belong to partition 5, have the email cd@superstar.com, and tweeted exactly "I had a pretty rough time during the last couple of weeks"?
records.gold_sql:
SELECT user_profiles.uid FROM user_profiles
JOIN tweets ON user_profiles.uid = tweets.uid
WHERE user_profiles.followers >= 23927492 AND user_profiles.partitionid = 5 AND tweets.text = 'I had a pretty rough time during the last couple of weeks' AND user_profiles.email = 'cd@superstar.com'

records.question: Who has the name Celine Dion, exactly 23927492 followers, email cd@superstar.com, partition ID 5, and tweeted "I had a pretty rough time during the last couple of weeks" on or before 2018-03-12 02:30:30?
records.gold_sql:
SELECT user_profiles.uid FROM user_profiles
JOIN tweets ON user_profiles.uid = tweets.uid
WHERE tweets.createdate <= '2018-03-12 02:30:30' AND user_profiles.partitionid = 5 AND user_profiles.followers = 23927492 AND user_profiles.email = 'cd@superstar.com' AND tweets.text = 'I had a pretty rough time during the last couple of weeks' AND user_profiles.name = 'Celine Dion'
records.pred_sql:
SELECT user_profiles.uid
FROM user_profiles
JOIN tweets ON user_profiles.uid = tweets.uid
WHERE user_profiles.partitionid = 5
  AND user_profiles.followers = 23927492
  AND user_profiles.email = 'cd@superstar.com'
  AND user_profiles.name = 'Celine Dion'
  AND tweets.createdate <= '2018-03-12 02:30:30'
  AND tweets.text = 'I had a pretty rough time during the last couple of weeks'
GROUP BY user_profiles.uid
HAVING COUNT(tweets.id) > 0
